name: Export QC HTML Report
description: Generate a self-contained HTML QC report from the output of library_summary_report(). Produces a single HTML document with no external dependencies: a pass/fail banner, a per-check summary table, and collapsible detail sections showing raw scalar metrics for each of the 8 library QC checks.

inputs.name: mapping_table_path
inputs.description: Path to mapping_table.tsv produced by the association step.

inputs.name: plasmid_count_path
inputs.description: Path to plasmid_counts.tsv produced by the DNA counting step.

inputs.name: design_manifest_path
inputs.description: Path to the oligo design manifest TSV with element metadata.

inputs.name: output_path
inputs.description: Path where the HTML report will be written. If omitted, the HTML string is returned without writing a file.

outputs.description: Self-contained HTML document string starting with <!DOCTYPE html>. Also writes to output_path if provided.

examples.description: Run QC and save report to disk
Get the HTML string without saving to file
